name: Piyush Tewari
body: Piyush is the founder and CEO of SaveLIFE Foundation, which he started in 2008 and which secured India's Good Samaritan Law and the Motor Vehicles Amendment Act, 2019. Its work has cut road fatalities by half on corridors like the Mumbai-Pune Expressway. A Harvard MPA and 2024 Skoll Award winner, he brings hard-won experience of changing public systems from the outside.
